sub_condition_signals.sleep_apnea: **Loud snoring, waking gasping, or a partner noticing breathing pauses** — worst on waking despite a 'full' night's sleep.
sub_condition_signals.anxiety: A **racing mind, constant worry, and physical tension** — thoughts scatter because they won't stop.
sub_condition_signals.depression: **Flat mood, loss of interest, and heaviness** — nothing feels rewarding, thinking feels slowed.
sub_condition_signals.poor_sleep: Tracks directly with **hours slept** — good nights clear it, bad nights bring it straight back.
sub_condition_signals.adhd: **Lifelong pattern** — chronic distractibility, unfinished projects, and time blindness, not a recent onset.
sub_condition_signals.hypothyroidism: **Cold hands, dry skin, constipation, and hair thinning** — the whole body feels slowed down.
sub_condition_signals.iron_deficiency: **Breathless climbing stairs, pale skin, and heavy periods or restless legs at night**.
sub_condition_signals.long_covid: Began or dramatically worsened **after a COVID infection** and hasn't lifted since.
sub_condition_signals.b12_deficiency: **Tingling or numbness in hands and feet** — often after years of vegetarian eating or reflux medication.
sub_condition_signals.vitamin_d_deficiency: **Worst in winter or after months indoors** — with vague aches and low mood tracking sunlight.
sub_condition_signals.dehydration: Clears within an hour of **water and a pinch of salt** — returns on coffee-only days.
sub_condition_signals.reactive_hypoglycemia: Hits **1–3 hours after carb-heavy meals** — shakiness, sweating, desperate hunger a snack resolves.
sub_condition_signals.histamine: Flares after **aged cheese, wine, leftovers, or cured meats** — often with flushing, itching, or a runny nose.
sub_condition_signals.sibo: Rises with **visible belly bloat within an hour of eating**, especially after carbs or fibre.
sub_condition_signals.chronic_stress: Set in during **prolonged overwork, caregiving, or crisis** — wired-but-tired evenings, shortened fuse.
sub_condition_signals.me_cfs: Dramatically worse **1–2 days after any physical or mental exertion**, taking days or weeks to recover.
sub_condition_signals.uars: Worst mornings despite no obvious snoring — with **frequent waking, cold hands, and a narrow palate or crowded teeth**.
sub_condition_signals.dysbiosis: Fluctuates with **gut symptoms — bloating, irregular stools, food reactions** — began after antibiotics, illness, or a diet change.
sub_condition_signals.fungal: **Sugar cravings, recurring thrush or athlete's foot** — worse after bread, wine, or sweets.
sub_condition_signals.insulin_resistance: **Carb-crashes after big meals** — with expanding waistline, skin tags, or dark patches at the neck.
sub_condition_signals.ncgs: Lifts within days of **removing wheat, returns within hours of eating it** — coeliac testing came back negative.
sub_condition_signals.cortisol_dysreg: Worst **mornings despite sleep** — with a second-wind late at night and mid-afternoon crashes.
sub_condition_signals.tmd: **Jaw clicking, morning jaw soreness, or headaches at the temples** — often after nighttime clenching or grinding.
sub_condition_signals.chronic_sinusitis: **Constant nasal congestion, facial pressure, or post-nasal drip** — worse bending forward.
sub_condition_signals.pots: Hits within minutes of **standing up** — racing heart, lightheadedness, and relief on lying down.
sub_condition_signals.migraine: **Light sensitivity, one-sided head pressure, and nausea** — sometimes without a full headache.
sub_condition_signals.mcas: Flares alongside **flushing, itching, hives, or reactions to many unrelated foods, smells, and temperature changes**.
sub_condition_signals.perimenopause: Arrived in the **40s alongside irregular periods, night sweats, and sleep disruption** — worst premenstrually.
sub_condition_signals.deviated_septum: **Breathing mostly through one nostril**, mouth-breathing at night, and a dry throat on waking.
sub_condition_signals.cervical_instability: Dramatically worse **holding the head upright**, eases when lying flat — often with neck pain and visual disturbance.
sub_condition_signals.atlas_misalignment: Began after a **whiplash, fall, or head injury** — with one-sided neck tension and headaches at the skull base.
sub_condition_signals.poor_posture: Builds through the day at a **desk with a forward-head slump** — tight shoulders, eases with movement.
sub_condition_signals.low_blood_pressure: **Lightheaded on standing, craving salt, faint in hot showers** — but without the racing heart.
sub_condition_signals.eds: **Bendy joints, stretchy skin, frequent sprains, and easy bruising** — with fatigue disproportionate to effort.
sub_condition_signals.leaky_gut: Fluctuates with **reactions to many seemingly unrelated foods** — with skin flares, joint aches, and diffuse inflammation.
sub_condition_signals.coeliac: **Long-standing gut symptoms, unexplained anaemia, or mouth ulcers** — with a family history of autoimmune disease.
sub_condition_signals.lyme: Began weeks to months after a **tick bite, rash, or camping trip** — with migrating joint pain and night sweats.
sub_condition_signals.ebv: Set in **after mono or a lingering flu that never resolved** — with recurring sore throats and swollen glands.
sub_condition_signals.mold_cirs: Dramatically worse **inside a specific building** — home, office, or basement — partially clears when away for days.
sub_condition_signals.low_testosterone: **Loss of morning erections, low libido, muscle loss, and flatness** — building gradually over years in men.
sub_condition_signals.post_concussion: Began after a **head injury or whiplash** — flares with screens, busy visual environments, or exertion.
sub_condition_signals.bvd: **Eye strain, dizziness in supermarkets, headaches while reading, and a subtle sense the world tilts** — glasses don't fix it.
sub_condition_signals.medication: Began or worsened within **weeks of starting a new prescription** — antihistamines, sleep aids, antidepressants, or blood pressure drugs.
sub_condition_signals.alcohol: Reliably follows **even one or two drinks the night before**, lingering well into the next afternoon.
sub_condition_signals.tos: **Arm numbness, tingling, or heaviness when raising the arms** — often with neck tension and cold hands.
sub_condition_signals.hpylori: **Upper-belly burning, nausea, early fullness, and burping** — worst on an empty stomach.
sub_condition_signals.mthfr: Worsens after **folic-acid-fortified foods or supplements** — with a family history of miscarriage, depression, or clotting issues.
sub_condition_signals.heavy_metals: Began after **occupational exposure, old amalgam fillings, or long-term high-mercury fish intake** — with metallic taste or tremor.
sub_condition_signals.pssd: Began during or after **stopping an SSRI or SNRI** — alongside genital numbness and emotional blunting that hasn't returned.
sub_condition_signals.mitochondrial: **Exercise intolerance out of proportion to fitness** — muscle fatigue on mild exertion, family pattern of similar unexplained fatigue.
